1 : 0, transform: "scale(1)", }), nav: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, top: 20, zIndex: 60, display: "flex", justifyContent: "center", padding: "0 20px", }, navInner: { width: "100%", maxWidth: 1200, display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", padding: "0 16px", }, brand: { fontFamily: "'Playfair Display', serif", fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: 4, fontSize: 24 }, menu: { display: "flex", gap: 18, alignItems: "center" }, reserveBtn: { border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25)", padding: "8px 12px", borderRadius: 4, textDecoration: "none", color: rootVars.muted, fontWeight: 600, }, heroWrap: { position: "absolute", left: "50%", top: "50%", transform: "translate(-50%,-50%)", zIndex: 50, width: "86%", maxWidth: 980, textAlign: "center", padding: "40px 28px", borderRadius: 12, background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15,12,12,0.35), rgba(20,18,18,0.55))", boxShadow: "0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)", backdropFilter: "blur(6px)", }, h1: { fontFamily: "'Playfair Display', serif", fontSize: 44, margin: 0, color: "white" }, lead: { color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)", marginTop: 12, marginBottom: 18, lineHeight: 1.7 }, cta: { background: rootVars.accent, color: "#fff", padding: "10px 18px", borderRadius: 6, textDecoration: "none", fontWeight: 600 }, arrow: (left) => ({ position: "absolute", top: "50%", transform: "translateY(-50%)", zIndex: 55, left: left ? 18 : "auto", right: left ? "auto" : 18, background: "transparent", border: "none", fontSize: 28, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.9)", cursor: "pointer", padding: "6px 10px", }), dots: { position: "absolute", left: "50%", transform: "translateX(-50%)", bottom: 18, display: "flex", gap: 8, zIndex: 70 }, dot: (active) => ({ width: 10, height: 10, borderRadius: "50%", background: active ? rootVars.accent : "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)", cursor: "pointer" }), pageIndicator: { position: "absolute", right: 28, bottom: 22, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.9)", zIndex: 70 }, reservationBar: { background: "#111", padding: "20px", display: "flex", justifyContent: "center", alignItems: "center", gap: 24 }, resTitle: { fontFamily: "'Playfair Display', serif", fontSize: 18, color: "#fff", marginRight: 12 }, counterBtn: { background: "#a88656", border: "none", color: "#fff", padding: "6px 10px", borderRadius: 6, cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 16 }, checkBtn: { background: "#a88656", color: "#fff", padding: "10px 18px", border: "none", borderRadius: 6, cursor: "pointer" }, welcomeSection: { background: "#f9f7f4", padding: "60px 20px", color: "#222", textAlign: "center" }, footer: { background: "#111", color: "#fff", padding: "40px 20px", textAlign: "center" }, }; function getTodayRangeLabel() { const d1 = new Date(); const d2 = new Date(); d2.setDate(d1.getDate() + 1); const fmt = (d) => d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" }); return `${fmt(d1)} - ${fmt(d2)}`; } export default function Home() { const images = ["/assets/glamp1.jpg", "/assets/glamp2.jpg", "/assets/glamp3.jpg"]; const [index, setIndex] = useState(0); const [adults, setAdults] = useState(1); const [children, setChildren] = useState(0); const [dateLabel, setDateLabel] = useState(getTodayRangeLabel()); // slider autoplay useEffect(() => { const id = setInterval(() => { setIndex((i) => (i + 1) % images.length); }, 6000); return () => clearInterval(id); }, [images.length]); const next = () => setIndex((i) => (i + 1) % images.length); const prev = () => setIndex((i) => (i - 1 + images.length) % images.length); const goTo = (i) => setIndex(i); return (
